mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, name, phone FROM user WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND is_deleted = false
SELECT DISTINCT dong FROM household ORDER BY dong
SELECT household_id AS householdId, dong, ho, created_at AS createdAt FROM household WHERE household_id = #{householdId}
SELECT household_id AS householdId, dong, ho, created_at AS createdAt FROM household WHERE dong = #{dong} AND ho = #{ho}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO household (dong, ho, created_at) VALUES (#{dong}, #{ho}, NOW())
INSERT INTO household_history (household_id, user_id, status, changed_at) VALUES (#{householdId}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET household_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT hh.history_id AS historyId, hh.household_id AS householdId, hh.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, hh.status, hh.changed_at AS changedAt FROM household_history hh LEFT JOIN user u ON hh.user_id = u.user_id WHERE hh.household_id = #{householdId} ORDER BY hh.changed_at DESC
SELECT user_id AS userId, name, phone, email FROM user WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND status = 'APPROVED' AND is_deleted = false

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.latest_status = '입주' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.latest_status IS NULL OR sub.latest_status = '퇴거' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `empty`, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT household_id) FROM household_history WHERE status = '입주' AND YEAR (changed_at) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(changed_at) = MONTH(NOW()) ) AS moveIn, ( SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT household_id) FROM household_history WHERE status = '퇴거' AND YEAR (changed_at) = YEAR (NOW()) AND MONTH (changed_at) = MONTH (NOW()) ) AS moveOut , ( SELECT COUNT (*) FROM household h WHERE -- 현재 이 세대에 연결된 유저가 없고 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user u WHERE u.household_id = h.household_id AND u.is_deleted = false ) AND ( -- 케이스 1: 이력 자체 없고 등록일 한달 이상 ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM household_history hh WHERE hh.household_id = h.household_id ) AND h.created_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW() , INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ) OR -- 케이스 2: 마지막 퇴거 이력이 한달 이상 ( SELECT hh.changed_at FROM household_history hh WHERE hh.household_id = h.household_id ORDER BY hh.changed_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) <= DATE_SUB(NOW() , INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ) ) AS needCare FROM ( /* 각 세대의 가장 최신 이력 status 를 서브쿼리로 추출 */ SELECT h.household_id, ( SELECT hh.status FROM household_history hh WHERE hh.household_id = h.household_id ORDER BY hh.changed_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_status FROM household h ) sub
